recommendations.title: Pope Joan
recommendations.overview: A 9th century woman of English extraction born in the German city of Ingelheim disguises herself as a man and rises through the Vatican ranks.

recommendations.title: The Miracle of Bern

recommendations.title: Contra

recommendations.title: Badhaai Ho
recommendations.overview: A 25-year-old man tries to suppress his embarrassment when his mother announces that she is pregnant.

recommendations.title: Persona
recommendations.overview: A young nurse, Alma, is put in charge of Elisabeth Vogler: an actress who is seemingly healthy in all respects, but will not talk. As they spend time together, Alma speaks to Elisabeth constantly, never receiving any answer.

recommendations.title: Dear Zachary: A Letter to a Son About His Father
recommendations.overview: In 2001, Andrew Bagby, a medical resident, is murdered not long after breaking up with his girlfriend. Soon after, when she announces she's pregnant, one of Andrew's many close friends, Kurt Kuenne, begins this film, a gift to the child.

recommendations.title: Almanya: Welcome to Germany

recommendations.title: An Inspector Calls
recommendations.genres: Drama, Crime, Thriller, Mystery, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: Northern England, 1912. The dinner of a wealthy family is interrupted by Inspector Goole, who only announces that a young woman has committed suicide. Then, he simply asks everyone present, one by one, if they knew her.
